Light Phone

# Light Phone

## Designed to be used as little as possible

117 followers

## Designed to be used as little as possible

117 followers

Visit website

Physical Products

•

Mental Health

The Light Phone is your phone away from phone. It's a tool that gives us back the most important things we take for granted, our time and attention.

 Overview
 Launches7
 Reviews
 Alternatives
 Team
 Awards
 More

This is the 7th launch from Light Phone. View more

## Light Flip

Launching today

Nostalgia for a time before smartphones

Light is a radically different technology company. We design beautiful tools that respect and empower our users and our first product is The Light Phone.

Payment Required

Launch tags:Hardware•Cell Phone

Launch Team

Subscribe [...] Promoted

creighton Nelson Vance

📌

Time and time again, we‘ve heard from people – especially the younger generations - who love flip phones, but the current options are poorly made, slow, unsupported, and often pre-installed with the same addictive apps built in. Light is taking everything that already works for tens of thousands of Light Phone users and is bringing that into a heavily desired yet timeless tactile form factor of a flip phone.

Gal Dayan [...] Gal Dayan

the whole reason people trust Light Phone is that it's deliberately incapable of most things, not just shaped like an old phone. curious where Flip lands on that spectrum - is this the same "as little as possible" philosophy in a flip shell, or does the nostalgia angle mean you've quietly added back more apps/features than the original Light Phone had, since that's usually how "fun retro form factor" products drift over a few versions.

Report

newsletter icon

The Leaderboard

July 22nd, 2026

# Return of the dumb phone

This newsletter was brought to you byElevenLabs

## Return of the dumb phone

gm legends, happy Wednesday.

Today: the flip phone the Razr co-creator built with no internet, Garmin's first screenless band with no subscription, and a former founder who built an app because he cannot stop looking at planes. OpenAI Day is tomorrow.

## The anti-smartphone

 co-founded Light Phone eleven years ago and has shipped three minimalist phones since. His co-founder Kaiwei Tang helped design the original Motorola Razr. Ships April 2027.
